label: Runway
description: Generate and transform video with Runway's Gen-2 and Gen-3 AI models via the RunwayML API.

form.title: Connect Runway
form.subtitle: Paste your Runway API key to start generating video with Gen-2 and Gen-3 models.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Runway API key from dev.runwayml.com. Quickest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Runway API key

1. Go to [dev.runwayml.com](https://dev.runwayml.com) and sign in with your Runway account.
2. In the left sidebar, click **API Keys**.
3. Click **Create new API key**, give it a name like `Anton`, and confirm.
4. Copy the key immediately — it is shown only once.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Your Runway account must have API access enabled. If you don't see the API Keys section, apply for API access from the developer portal.
- API usage is billed against your Runway credits. Monitor usage at **dev.runwayml.com → Usage**.
- If you lose the key, delete it and create a new one — Anton will prompt you to re-enter it.
- Keep the key secret; anyone with it can generate video and consume your credits.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at dev.runwayml.com → API Keys. Shown once at creation — copy it before closing the dialog.

fields.name: default_model
fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: The Runway model Anton will use by default when generating video.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Leave as default unless Runway has assigned you a custom endpoint.
